3229280.name: Bullet Dawn
3229280.description:
Foul beasts of the night haunt your realm. Shoot, loot, and survive the night.

Shoot

Select a weapon and stick to it, upgrade your weapon as you progress to survive endless hordes of enemies.

Loot

Select an Item every time you level-up. Unlock chests with keys for additional Item rewards and upgrade your weapon of choice.

There are no limits to the number of items or weapon upgrades, break the game if you wish to.

What to Expect

  • Self-contained single player experience: no micro-transactions, play offline anytime.

  • Every run lasts between 10 to 20 minutes.

  • Customize each run with Runes that suit your playstyle.
